# `WaitForRaster`

**Systems:** C64, MEGA65, PLUS4, C128, VIC20, OK64, GAMEBOY, SPECTRUM, MSX,  TIKI100  
**Parameters:** `b`

***

<div markdown="0" class="trse-help-body">

<p>Waits until rasterline [parameter 1] has been reached. Example:
<code>
// Wait until rasterline 200 
waitforraster(200); 
</code> 


</div>
